rationale: Tests if price distance from a rolling volatility-adjusted corridor captures deep structural extensions.
expected_failure_mode: During strong trends, price can ride the corridor edge indefinitely, causing severe under-exposure or premature exits.
stop_conditions: simple family fails the named-window or parsimony gates
no new family leader improves Future Confidence and Trust
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Underperforms buy-and-hold by more than 25% during a sustained 12-month bull market.
Maximum drawdown reduction versus buy-and-hold is less than 5%.
